services.heading: Menya Ũrogi Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Thutha wa Mĩtũũrĩre Yĩtũ

learnLanguage.title: Ĩthoma Rũthiomi
learnLanguage.description: Kũũra ũthaka wa rũthiomi rwa Gĩabirika na ũkoranĩrie na mĩtũũrĩre mĩingĩ ĩrĩa ĩrĩ kontinent yothe.

exploreIdentity.title: Menya ũmenyekani na mĩtũũrĩre
exploreIdentity.description: Kũũra mathĩĩna na mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa yaumĩire mĩtũũrĩre ya Abirika na yakoranĩirie andũ amo na matukũ.

streamFolklore.title: Ona ngano, nyĩmbo, na ũkũndania
streamFolklore.description: Kũũra mĩĩ ya ũmenyekani wa Gĩabirika na mĩtũũrĩre ĩrĩa yĩtaũrĩrwo kuuma rũciaro rũmwe nginya rũngĩ.

about.title: Ũhoro wa Magical Africa
about.description: Magical Africa nĩyonanĩria ũthaka, mĩtũũrĩre, na ngano cia Abirika. Tũkonanĩria mĩtũũrĩre ya kontinent ĩno, matũũra ma kũhũũrana, na ngwatanĩro ya muoyo, tũkĩana kĩrĩa gĩtũmaga Abirika ĩkorwo na ũrogi wa ma.

maasaiBracelets.title: Mbangili cia Gĩmaasai
maasaiBracelets.description: Mbangili cia shanga cia Gĩmaasai cionania mĩtũũrĩre na ũhunaji.

beadedJewelery.title: Indo cia shanga
beadedJewelery.description: Indo cia mahiga ciombĩtwo na moko na ũthaka wa kawaĩda.

maasaiNecklaces.title: Mikũfũ ya Gĩmaasai
maasaiNecklaces.description: Mikũfũ ya shanga ya Gĩmaasai yĩna rangi ĩrĩa cioneka wega.

ankaraGown.title: Ngũo ya Ankara
ankaraGown.description: Yombĩtwo na ngũo ya Ankara, yĩhumbagwo mĩtũũrĩre mĩingĩ ya Gĩnigeria.

maasaiLeso.title: Leso ya Gĩmaasai
maasaiLeso.description: Yĩhumbagwo nĩ arũme na atumia a Gĩmaasai Kenya na Tanzania.

kitenge.title: Kitenge
kitenge.description: Kĩombĩtwo na ngũo ya pamba yĩna mĩĩko ya rangi kwa arũme na atumia.

carpentryTools.title: Iria cia Ũhunaji Mĩtĩ
carpentryTools.description: Iria cia ũhunaji mĩtĩ cia ahunaji kwa wĩra mwega.

farmingTools.title: Iria cia Ũrĩmi
farmingTools.description: Iria cia ũrĩmi cia tene cĩkĩhuthĩrwo ũmũthĩ.

traditionalSpears.title: Mĩtĩ ya Tene
traditionalSpears.description: Mĩtĩ ĩrĩa yombĩtwo na moko yahuthĩrwo nĩ njamba.

drums.title: Ngoma
drums.description: Ngoma cia Gĩabirika cia tene kwa mĩario na matũũro.

stringInstruments.title: Indo cia Nyuĩ
stringInstruments.description: Indo cia nyuĩ ciombĩtwo na moko cĩna mĩrĩro ĩrĩa ĩ ĩmwe.

windInstruments.title: Indo cia Rũhuho
windInstruments.description: Mĩturirĩro na ihembe cia tene ciombĩtwo na indo cia kawaĩda.

languages.title: Ĩthoma Rũthiomi Rwĩtũ
languages.description: Abirika nĩ mũciĩ wa rũthiomi ngiri nyingĩ, ĩrĩa yothe yĩkũũa ũhoro wa tene, ũmenyekani, na mĩtũũrĩre. Menya mahoya na maũndũ ma kawaĩda kuuma mĩhĩrĩga ya Gĩabirika na ũkoranĩrie na kontinent kũhuthĩra rũthiomi.

swahili.name: Gĩswahili
swahili.tooltip: Mahoya ma kawaĩda nĩ 'Habari?', yĩtiĩtwo 'Wĩ mwega?'

yoruba.name: Gĩyoruba
yoruba.tooltip: 'Báwo ni?' nĩ mahoya ma Gĩyoruba yĩtiĩtwo 'Wĩ mwega?'

kikuyu.name: Gĩkũyũ
kikuyu.tooltip: Mahoya ma kawaĩda nĩ 'Jambo', yĩtiĩtwo 'Nĩ wega'

shona.name: Gĩshona
shona.tooltip: 'Mhoro' nĩ mahoya ma Gĩshona yĩtiĩtwo 'Nĩ wega.'

sukuma.name: Gĩsukuma
sukuma.tooltip: Mahoya ma kawaĩda nĩ 'Moro', yĩtiĩtwo 'Nĩ wega'

xhosa.name: Gĩxhosa
xhosa.tooltip: 'Molo' nĩ mahoya ma Gĩxhosa yĩtiĩtwo 'Nĩ wega.'

maasai.name: Gĩmaasai
maasai.tooltip: Mahoya ma kawaĩda nĩ 'Sanu', yĩtiĩtwo 'Nĩ wega'

igbo.name: Gĩigbo
igbo.tooltip: Mahoya ma kawaĩda nĩ 'Kedu?', yĩtiĩtwo 'Wĩ mwega?'

lingala.name: Gĩlingala
lingala.tooltip: Mahoya ma kawaĩda nĩ 'Mbote', yĩtiĩtwo 'Nĩ wega'

tsonga.name: Gĩtsonga
tsonga.tooltip: Mahoya ma kawaĩda nĩ 'Avuxeni', yĩtiĩtwo 'Rũcinĩ rwega'

setswana.name: Gĩsetswana
setswana.tooltip: Mahoya ma kawaĩda nĩ 'Dumela', yĩtiĩtwo 'Nĩ wega'

chichewa.name: Gĩchichewa
chichewa.tooltip: Mahoya ma kawaĩda nĩ 'Moni', yĩtiĩtwo 'Nĩ wega'

tribes.title: Menya Mĩhĩrĩga Yĩtũ
tribes.subtitle: Rũgendo rũthiĩre mĩhĩrĩga ya Abirika ĩrĩa ĩhũũranĩte na mĩtũũrĩre ya tene

oromo.name: Oromo
oromo.description: Andũ a Oromo kuuma Ethiopia, makũũa ũtaũo wa kũĩgĩria wa mĩtũũrĩre, ũmwe, na ũmenyekani wa mĩtũũrĩre. Nĩo mũhĩrĩga mũnene mũno, makĩũmba thĩka ĩmwe kũmĩĩna ĩtatũ ya andũ na andũ milioni 40.

zulu.name: Zulu
zulu.description: Kuuma South Africa, andũ a Zulu makũũa ũtaũo wa hinya wa mĩtũũrĩre, kũũmĩrĩra, na ũmenyekani, makĩĩmĩĩra andũ milioni 11.

igbo.name: Igbo
igbo.description: Andũ a Igbo kuuma Nigeria, nĩo ũmwe wa mĩhĩrĩga mĩnene mũno, makĩrĩ andũ milioni 30, mamenyekete nĩ mĩtũũrĩre yao mĩnene, ũcũũranĩri, na maũndũ ma kĩũnganĩro.

socialImpact.title: Mũtũũrĩre Witũ kwa Andũ
socialImpact.description: Twĩtĩkĩtie kũcokerera mĩhĩrĩga ĩrĩa ĩtũthaithĩtie. Kũhuthĩra ndandano yĩtũ, twĩteithĩtie ahunaji a gĩcigĩ, tũhariirie ũtaũo wa mĩtũũrĩre, na tũũmbĩte mahinda ma mbeca kwa Abirika yothe.

artisans.title: Gũteithĩa Ahunaji a Gĩcigĩ
artisans.description: Twĩkoranĩtie ahunaji a gĩcigĩ na macũnjĩ ma thĩ yothe, tũkĩĩhĩgia makĩĩhĩtio mbeca njega nĩ wĩra wao.

heritage.title: Kũhariria Ũtaũo
heritage.description: Kĩvathĩko gĩtũ kĩa digital gĩteithĩtie kũhariria rũthiomi rũrĩa rũrĩ hatarĩnĩ, mĩtũũrĩre, na maũndũ ma gĩtũũrĩrĩre kwa rũciaro rũrĩa rũũkĩte.

partners.title: Ashirika Aitũ
partners.description: Twĩkoranĩtie na makundi marĩa mahũũrũkĩra maũndũ maitũ ma kũhariria na kũhũũra mĩtũũrĩre ya Gĩabirika. Hamwe, twĩkũũmba mũtũũrĩre mũnene.

whatIs.question: Magical Africa nĩ kĩĩ?
whatIs.answer: Magical Africa nĩ ndandano ĩrĩa yĩĩhĩte kũhariria, kũnanĩra, na kũana ũtaũo wa mĩtũũrĩre wa Abirika na thĩ yothe. Tũkoranĩtie andũ na mĩtũũrĩre ya Gĩabirika ya ma, rũthiomi, mĩtũũrĩre, na mĩhĩrĩga.

contribute.question: Nĩngĩĩka atĩa gũteithĩa Magical Africa?
contribute.answer: Ũngĩteithĩa na kũana ngano, cithĩ, kana ũũgĩ ũhoro wa mũhĩrĩga waku. Ĩandĩkĩthia na ũhuthĩre iria ciitũ cia gũteithĩa kũongera maũndũ ũhoro wa mĩtũũrĩre, rũthiomi, na ũtaũo wa mũhĩrĩga waku.

authentic.question: Maũndũ marĩa marĩ Magical Africa nĩ ma ma?
authentic.answer: Ĩĩ! Maũndũ maitũ mothe makumĩtwo kuuma kwa andũ a mĩhĩrĩga na arutani a mĩtũũrĩre. Tũrũtagĩra hamwe na mĩhĩrĩga ya gĩcigĩ kũĩhĩgia maũndũ mothe marĩa tũanaga nĩ ma ma.

learnLanguage.question: Nĩngĩĩthoma atĩa rũthiomi rwa Gĩabirika kũndandano ĩno?
learnLanguage.answer: Tũheaga indo cia kũĩthomera rũthiomi irĩ hamwe na ciugo cia kawaĩda, kwaria kuuma kwa andũ arĩa mararagia rũthiomi rwao, na maũndũ ma gĩtũũrĩrĩre gũkũteithĩa ũmenya na ũkunĩre rũthiomi rwa Gĩabirika.

purchase.question: No ngũre indo cia Gĩabirika cia ma?
purchase.answer: Ĩĩ! Ndũka yĩtũ ĩrĩ na indo cia mĩtũũrĩre cia ma ciombĩtwo na moko nĩ ahunaji a Gĩabirika. Kũgũra guothe gũteithĩtie mĩhĩrĩga ya gĩcigĩ na gũteithĩtie kũhariria ũhunaji wa tene.

contact.description: Ũrĩ na maũũria ũhoro wa mĩtũũrĩre ya Gĩabirika, ũtaũo, kana indo ciitũ? Tũhũũrĩe na ũkũũre ngano, mĩtũũrĩre, na ũũmbi ũrĩa ũtũmaga Abirika ĩkorwo ĩrĩ ĩmwe. Tũngĩenda gũkorana nawe na kũana ũrogi wa ma wa Abirika.

footer.tagline: Kũrĩa Rũgano rwa Ma rwa Abirika Rũtuĩre
footer.copyright: © 2026 Magical.africa. Wathĩ wothe nĩ wa kũrigĩrĩrwo

auth.joinTextEnd: na ũkũũre mĩtũũrĩre ya Abirika, ũtaũo, ngano, na mĩtũũrĩre.

explore.title: Menya Abirika ya Ma
explore.description: Kũũra mĩtũũrĩre mĩnene, mĩtũũrĩre, na ngano kuuma kontinent yothe handũ hamwe.

connect.title: Korana na Ũtaũo
connect.description: Menya Abirika kũhuthĩra andũ ayo, mĩhĩrĩga, na mĩtũũrĩre ya tene, ĩrĩa yĩhĩtĩtwo wega.

travel.title: Thiĩ Gũkĩra Gwa Kawaĩda
travel.description: Hũgũra matũũra ma kũhũũrana na maũndũ ma mĩtũũrĩre marĩa makĩra njĩra ya kawaĩda ya andũ.

errors.noAccount: Gũtirĩ akaunti yonekire na barua pepe ĩno
errors.wrongPassword: Neno rĩa gĩcigo ti rĩa ma
errors.invalidCredential: Barua pepe kana neno rĩa gĩcigo ti cia ma
errors.passwordLength: Neno rĩa gĩcigo nĩ rĩagĩrĩire gũkorwo na ihenya 6

hero.title: Menya Mĩhĩrĩga ya Abirika
hero.subtitle: Kũũra ũhũũranĩ wa mĩtũũrĩre, mĩtũũrĩre, na ũtaũo wa Abirika kontinent yothe.

section.title: Mĩhĩrĩga ya Abirika
section.subtitle: Menya mĩtũũrĩre ĩrĩa ĩhũũranĩte, mĩtũũrĩre, na ngano cia mĩhĩrĩga ya Abirika kuuma kontinent yothe.

contribute.title: Mũhĩrĩga Waku Gũtirĩ Haha?
contribute.description: Tũteithĩe kũhariria na kũana mĩtũũrĩre yaku. Ongera rũgano rwa mũhĩrĩga waku, mĩtũũrĩre, rũthiomi, na ũtaũo kũrĩ Magical.Africa.

maasai.name: Maasai
maasai.desc: Njamba cia kũhũũra cimenyekete nĩ mĩtũũrĩre na ngũo cia kũhũũrana.

ashanti.name: Ashanti
ashanti.desc: Mamenyekete nĩ ũhunaji wa thahabu na Ũthamaki wa Ashanti.

hausa.name: Hausa
hausa.desc: Ĩmwe ya mĩhĩrĩga mĩnene Abirika, yamenyekete nĩ ũcũũrani.

zulu.name: Zulu
zulu.desc: Mamenyekete nĩ mĩtũũrĩre ya njamba, gũthondeka ubuhlalu, na Ũthamaki wa Zulu.

yoruba.name: Yoruba
yoruba.desc: Marĩ na ngano, ũhunaji, na matũũra ma tene ta Ife na Oyo.

kikuyu.name: Kikuyu
kikuyu.desc: Mũhĩrĩga mũnene mũno Kenya, ũmenyekete nĩ ũrĩmi na ũcũũrani.

igbo.name: Igbo
igbo.desc: Mamenyekete nĩ mĩoyo ya ũcũũrani na mĩtũũrĩre ya ũhunaji.

amhara.name: Amhara
amhara.desc: Mũhĩrĩga ũrĩa warĩ na hinya Ethiopia ũrĩ na ũtaũo wa Gĩkristo wa tene.

berber.name: Berber
berber.desc: Andũ a gũciarĩro a North Africa marĩ na mĩtũũrĩre na rũthiomi rwa tene.

swahili.name: Swahili
swahili.desc: Andũ a iria mamenyekete nĩ ũcũũrani wa iria.

wolof.name: Wolof
wolof.desc: Mũhĩrĩga mũnene Senegal ũmenyekete nĩ gũkĩrĩra ageni na ũmwe.

fulani.name: Fulani
fulani.desc: Arũgĩri a kũhũũra a West Africa marĩ na mĩtũũrĩre ya kũhũũrana.

history.title: Ũhoro na Gũthiĩ
history.p1: Andũ a Maasai nĩ mũhĩrĩga wa Gĩnilotic ũrĩa ũtũũraga rũgongo, gatagatĩ na ithĩ ria Kenya na rũgongo rwa Tanzania. Nĩo andũ a gĩcigĩ amenyekete mũno thĩ yothe nĩ ũndũ wa gũtũũra kwao hakuhĩ na mbũtho nyingĩ cia nyamũ cia Maziwa Manene ma Afrika na mĩtũũrĩre na ngũo ciao cĩa kũũmĩrĩka.
history.p2: Andũ a Maasai marĩthomaga rũthiomi rwa Gĩmaa, rũthiomi rwa nyũmba ya rũthiomi rwa Gĩnilotic rũrĩa rũhũũrũkĩra Dinka na Nuer. Mamenyekete nĩ mĩtũũrĩre yao ya kũũmĩrĩka, mĩĩrio, na ngũo, o na rĩĩtwa rĩao ta njamba na arĩithi a ngũkũ. Andũ a Maasai mahotete gũtũũrĩria mĩtũũrĩre yao mĩingĩ ya tene o na gũkũrwo nĩ ũhinganĩo kuuma ũgaũ wa rĩu.

identity.title: Ũmenyekani na Mũtũũrĩre
identity.description: Andũ a Maasai nĩ arĩithi a nyamũ mathamagĩra marĩa tene maehereire ngũkũ, ngondu, na mbũri nĩ gũtũũra. Ngũkũ cĩna bata mũnene mũno kwa mĩtũũrĩre ya Gĩmaasai, cĩonanĩria ũtonga, ũmenyekani, na irio. Andũ a Maasai mapĩmaga ũtonga wa mũndũ mũrũme nĩ ũingĩ wa ngũkũ na ciana arĩ nacio.

language.title: Rũthiomi
language.description: Rũthiomi rwa Gĩmaa nĩ rũthiomi rwa tene rwa andũ a Maasai a Afrika Mashariki. Rũthomaga mũno Kenya na rũgongo rwa Tanzania, na nĩ rwa nyũmba ya rũthiomi rwa Gĩnilotic. Gĩmaa ti ndĩa ya kũneenana o ĩĩkĩ — rũĩna wĩra mũnene wa kũrĩria mĩtũũrĩre ya Gĩmaasai, ũmenyekani, na mĩĩrio ya kanua.

audio.title: Thĩkĩrĩria Mahoya ma Tene
audio.description: Ĩthoma gũthoma Gĩmaa kũhana na ma kuuma kũ andũ mathomaga rũthiomi rwa mbere, ũkĩrĩria mĩrĩro ya ma, mũthĩo, na ũtaũro wa mĩtũũrĩre wa rũthiomi rwa Gĩmaasai.

clothing.title: Ngũo na Indo cia Kũĩtĩkĩra cia Tene
clothing.description: Andũ a Maasai mamenyekete nĩ ngũo ciao cia kũũmĩrĩka cia rangi mũthune cĩĩtagwo "shuka." Mũthune nĩ rangi ya bata mũno, yonanĩria ũcamba, ũmwe, na thakame. Arũme na atumia othe mahumba indo cia shanga cia bata, rangi na mĩthĩo mĩhũũraĩne ĩkĩonanĩria mĩaka, ũmenyekani wa gũciarwo, na ũmenyekani wa andũ.

eunoto.title: Eunoto
eunoto.desc: Mũario wa gũkũra ũrĩa njamba ciũkĩrwo atumia anini

enkipaata.title: Enkipaata
enkipaata.desc: Mũario wa mbere wa gũtahĩrwo nĩ ariũ

emuratare.title: Emuratare
emuratare.desc: Mũario wa gũtahĩrwo ũonanĩria gũũka kwa ũnjamba

enkang.title: Enkang oo-nkiri
enkang.desc: Mĩario ya gũciarwo ĩrĩ na kũrathĩmwo kwa tene

olngesherr.title: Olngesherr
olngesherr.desc: Mĩario ya gũciarwo ĩrĩ na kũrathĩmwo kwa tene

nyamaChoma.title: Nyama Choma
nyamaChoma.desc: Nyama ĩthĩĩtwo, mũno ya mbũri na ngũkũ

olpurda.title: Olpurda
olpurda.desc: Thũũbu ĩrĩkĩtwo na nyama, magũrũ, na mĩtĩ

leaders.title: Atongoria Amenyekete a Tene na Rĩu

laibonLenana.name: Laibon Lenana
laibonLenana.desc: Mũtongoria wa ngwatanĩro wa Gĩmaasai wĩna hinya ũrĩa warũtĩre wĩra mũnene ĩtina wa ũkoloni wa Waingereza.

olonana.name: Olonana
olonana.desc: Mũtongoria na Laibon ũrĩa wakwarĩire mikataba ya kũrĩria matũũra ma Gĩmaasai.

mbatian.name: Mbatian
mbatian.desc: Laibon ũrĩa ũmenyekete mũno, amenyekete nĩ ũnabii wake na kũĩnganĩa andũ a Maasai.

oleSaibul.name: Ole Saibul
oleSaibul.desc: Mũndũ wa siasa wa Gĩmaasai ũrĩa ũmenyekete na ũrĩa wakwatĩĩre wĩra wa andũ arĩithi Kenya.

oleNtimama.name: William Ole Ntimama
oleNtimama.desc: Mũndũ wa siasa wa Kenya ũrĩa wakwatĩĩre wĩra wa matũũra ma Gĩmaasai mĩaka mĩingĩ.

oleLenku.name: Joseph Ole Lenku
oleLenku.desc: Gavana wa rĩu wa Kajiado County na ũrĩa warĩ Secretary wa Cabinet.

nature.title: Ũhũũrũkĩrĩre na Gĩcigĩ
nature.description: Andũ a Maasai matũũrĩte na thayũ na nyamũ cia gĩthaka mĩaka mĩingĩ, makĩhũũrũka gĩcigĩ kĩmwe na ngatĩ, njogũ, na nyamũ cia gĩthaka ĩngĩ. Mũtũũrĩre wao wa arĩithi na mĩĩtĩkĩro ya tene nĩĩteithĩtie kũrĩria matũũra manene ma gĩthaka.

cattle.name: Ngũkũ
cattle.desc: Kĩheo kĩtheru kuuma kũ Enkai (Ngai), kĩ na bata kũ ũmenyekani na kũtũũra kwa andũ a Maasai

lions.name: Ngatĩ
lions.desc: Ciathĩĩtwo nĩ cia ũcamba; tene ciachũĩtwo nĩ njamba kwa mĩario ya gũkũra

elephants.name: Njogũ
elephants.desc: Ciathĩĩtwo nĩ ũũgĩ na hinya; cĩrĩrĩagwo na kũrĩria kwa tene

giraffes.name: Ndũĩga
giraffes.desc: Cionekanaga ta nyamũ njega cĩhũũrũkaga matũũra mao ma irio

antiques.title: Indo cia Tene na Indo cia Kale
antiques.description: Andũ a Maasai maũmbĩte indo cia kũũmĩrĩka, indo cia ũta, na indo cia kũĩtĩkĩra mĩaka mĩingĩ. Indo ĩci cĩonanĩria ũtonga wao wa mĩtũũrĩre na cĩrĩrĩraga gũkorwo cĩĩndu cia ũmenyekani na mĩtũũrĩre.

rungu.name: Rungu (Mũtĩ wa Gũtũpa)
rungu.desc: Mũtĩ wa tene ũrĩa ũtũmĩkagwo nĩ njamba nĩ gũkũnga na kũua

shuka.name: Shuka (Ngũo Mũthune)
shuka.desc: Ngũo mũthune ĩmenyekete ĩhumbagwo ta ngũo ya tene

beadedJewelry.name: Indo cia Shanga
beadedJewelry.desc: Wĩra wa shanga ũrĩa ũonanĩria ũmenyekani, mĩaka, na ũmenyekani

spear.name: Mũũ (Enkudi)
spear.desc: Kĩndũ kĩa ũrũme na kĩndũ kĩa mbere kĩa njamba cia Gĩmaasai

shield.name: Ngũbũ (Olongu)
shield.desc: Ngũbũ cia kũsĩngĩra cĩapakĩtwo mĩthĩo ya kũũmĩrĩka yonanĩria ũmenyekani wa nyũmba

calabash.name: Gĩnya (Enkukuri)
calabash.desc: Indo cia gĩnya cĩtũmĩkagwo kũrĩria mũthanyiko wa iria na thakame

preserve.title: Tũteithĩe Kũrĩria Ũtonga wa Gĩmaasai
preserve.description: Ũrĩ na rũgano, mbaisĩ, kana ũmenyo wa kũneenana ũhoro wa mĩtũũrĩre ya Gĩmaasai?

hero.title: Ũhoro wa Magical Africa
hero.tagline: Gũtũũra Thĩmu cia Afrika. Gũtega mĩrĩ. Gũaka mũcemanio.

background.paragraph1: Magical.africa nĩ kĩama kĩa Pan-African gĩkĩruta wĩra harĩa thĩmu cia Afrika, mĩtugo, ũhoti, na tekinolojia ikũmanĩrĩire. Tũrĩ tũteithĩrie gũtũmĩka, gũkũra, na kũgĩa thĩmu cia mĩrĩ bũrũri wothe.
background.paragraph2: Thĩmu cia Afrika nĩ cia bata mũno kwa ũhoti, maisha, na ũmwe wa mĩrĩ, no cinyingi itirĩ igĩtũmĩka wega mĩthemba ya thirikari na ngʼahi cia dijitali. Magical Africa nĩgũthondeka thĩna ũyũ na njĩra ya kũringa mĩrĩ na ũigana ũkũmaũra arĩa mamenye, arutani, atafiti, na aitũ a tekinolojia.
background.paragraph3: Kwa gũtũmĩra tekinolojia ta kĩheo gĩa gũteithia ti gũcenjia tũteithagĩa gũtũika thĩmu cia Afrika na ũmenyo wa mĩtugo mĩthemba ya rĩu na njĩra ya wega, gũtũika andũ othe, na kũgĩa.

approach.title: Njĩra Yitũ
approach.description: Tũnyitanĩtie mĩtugo, tekinolojia, na ũhoti gũtega mĩrĩ na gũtũũra ũthamaki wa Afrika.

datastewardship.title: Gũteithĩria Data ya Thĩmu na Mĩtugo ya Afrika
datastewardship.description: Tũrũtagĩra wĩra na mĩrĩ gũandĩka, gũteithĩria, na gũtũũra thĩmu na mĩtugo ya Afrika na njĩra ihooyaga mũtũgo wa gũkũ, ũhoro, na maũndũ ma bata. Wĩra witũ nĩ ũtwĩte:
items: Rũthĩmu rwa kwaria na mĩtugo ya kamũũrĩ
Mĩtugo ya gũthikĩrĩrio na maũndũ ma mũthenya
Gũandĩka ũthamaki wa mĩtugo
Gũandĩka thĩmu nyingi bũrũri wothe wa Afrika

aiDataCollection.title: Gũkũũra Data ya AI ĩrĩngaga Mĩrĩ
aiDataCollection.description: Magical Africa nĩyandĩkaga na nĩtongoria njĩra ya gũkũũra data ya wega ĩtongoriwo nĩ mĩrĩ ĩteithagĩa kugeithia AI ĩtũĩkaga thĩmu cia Afrika. Tũrĩngaga:
items: Mũgambo, gũandĩka, na data ya mĩthemba mĩingi
Maũndũ ma gũtũmĩra ma kweli (ũhoti, mĩtugo, maisha)
Gũtũmĩra wega na gũriha
Gũteithĩria data na ũhoro

education.title: Mĩrimo ya Ũhoti na Ũmenyo wa Mĩtugo
education.description: Tũrũtagĩra wĩra thukuru, maũndũ ma gũthoma, na maũndũ ma mĩtugo mĩthemba mĩingi ya Afrika gũteithĩa gũthoma rũthĩmu, gũtwara ũmenyo, na gũcenjia gatĩgatĩ ka miaka. Tũrĩngaga:
items: Maũndũ ma gũthoma thĩmu nyingi
Ũmenyo wa kamũũrĩ na ngano
Mĩhuko na mĩtugo ya kĩĩaro
Gũtũmĩra rĩĩka rĩa ũhoti na ũbuni

principles.title: Mĩĩhigo Yitũ
items: Pan-African na njĩra - ĩmĩkĩrĩire gũkũ, ĩnyitanĩtie bũrũri wothe
Mĩrĩ Mbere - Mĩrĩ nĩ aitũ, ti maũndũ ma data
Wega na Kũambĩrĩria - Mũĩrĩtu, kwĩhokeka, na thĩrĩ itingĩtarĩkwo
Gũtiĩra Mĩtugo - Rũthĩmu na mĩtugo nĩ mĩthemba ĩrĩ muoyo
Kwĩyũrũka na Gũkũũrana - Tũteithagĩa ũmenyo wĩyũrũka na gũthoma hamwe
AI ĩrĩngaga Andũ - Tekinolojia nĩya gũtũmĩkĩra andũ, ti kwĩhoya

preparingData.title: Gũthondeka Data kwa AI ĩtũĩkaga Othe
items: Gũtũa kwaria (ASR)
Gũandĩka-kũũrũka-mũgambo (TTS)
Vĩheo vya gũthoma vya mũgambo
Mĩrimo ya ũhoti na mĩtugo ya mĩthemba mĩingi

research.title: Ũtafiti na Gũthima Wega Gũteithĩo nĩ AI
items: Teithĩa na njĩra ya gũandĩka na kũĩguĩra
Wona thĩna wa kũgĩa rũthĩmu
Teithĩa gũthima wega ithaa hamwe na kwĩhokeka kwa andũ

communityTools.title: Vĩheo Vĩtongoriwo nĩ Mĩrĩ
items: Vĩheo vya gũthoma vĩteithĩo nĩ AI
Vĩheo vya ũhoti vya mũgambo na mĩthemba mĩingi
Maũndũ ma gũandĩka mĩtugo

partners.title: Tũrũtagĩra Wĩra na Ai
partners.description: Tũrũtagĩra wĩra bũrũri wa Afrika na

team.title: Menyera Kĩama
team.description: Mĩĩrio ya ngoro inyuma ya Magical Africa

cta.title: Witũe Hamwe Gũtũũra Ngano ya Afrika ya Kweli
cta.description: Afrika ndĩĩhooyaga kũĩguĩrwo nĩ andũ a nja. Tũgatwara ngano yitũ tũengi na wĩhoko, na ũhoro, na ũbuni, na ũrĩri.
